children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: The value of the gross estate shall include the value of any property to which this section applies in which the decedent had a qualifying income interest for life.

children.heading: Property to which this section applies
children.label: b Property to which this section applies
A
children.text: under section 2056 by reason of subsection (b)(7) thereof, or

children.label: B
children.text: under section 2523 by reason of subsection (f) thereof, and
section 2519 (relating to dispositions of certain life estates) did not apply with respect to a disposition by the decedent of part or all of such property.

children.heading: Property treated as having passed from decedent
children.label: c Property treated as having passed from decedent
children.text: For purposes of this chapter and chapter 13, property includible in the gross estate of the decedent under subsection (a) shall be treated as property passing from the decedent.
